name: io.github.ipayx-technologies/fx-audit
title: iPayX FX Audit
description: Forensic FX audit engine. Detects hidden bank markups in real time. Compares any bank or broker rate against live mid-market rates (Twelve Data + OXR fallback). Returns spread in bps, audit score 1-10, and a certified forensic link. Designed for AI agents, CFOs, and treasury teams.
